text_block_list.name: Palmer and Helios
text_block_list.text: Camping in Hokkaido! Waheeey! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As promised, we take time off during summer
camp to visit Hokkaido again, and the three of us
decide to enjoy the great outdoors.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hi-yah! ☆ How's this, Palmster? Do you think I
have a chance of landing a big one now?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah, for sure. Now we just gotta stay still and...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! ♪ Look at us! Sweetfish've got nothing on how sweet it is to go fishing with your bestie! We're charged up on vibes! Waheyyy! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hey, you'll spook the fish!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Ugh, it got away... Man, that low key sucks...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: BBQ! ☆ BBQ! ★ With lots of yakisoba too! Yay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Sizzle...

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh dang, this is bussin'! ♪ Palmster, what's in
this?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Chives, potatoes, and stuff. I winged the
seasoning. Does it taste okay?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
It's good for sure, but like... I guess in a
home-cooked kinda way. I'd be down to eat this
three times a day, no cap! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: That's good to hear! Help yourself, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing fancy about Mejiro Palmer's
yakisoba. It's just comforting and warm, like a
lovingly cooked meal at home.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not trying to be something it's not, and that's
what makes it so tasty.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Okay, time to taste the coffee my bestie made!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! There are weird chunks in this! Helios, what
are these?!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Oh, those are tapioca pearls! ♪ Get my boba
coffee, in stores now! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Did you just toss some into the coffee for the
heck of it?! Ahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You know, the way we camp is all over the place,
but it's fun as anything!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I wish I could do this forever!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, sounds like you got an epiphany. ☆ Maybe
you should drop the cleats and become a
full-time outdoor Umatube vlogger!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
"Partygirl Camper ☆" has a nice ring to it,
don'tcha think? You can try to go viral and
become a top streamer online!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, an Umatube vlogger? You know, that could
be it for me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I could make Hokkaido my base and shoot fun
vids here! There's tons of stuff I could do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: What do you think'll get views, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When I think of outdoorsy videos, the first thing
that comes to mind is...
choice_data_list: Toughing it out in the cold.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh wow, a farm? I could make a whole homestead
for party lovers! That sounds tough, but that'll
rack up views, for sure!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wa-wa-wa-waheeeey! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna till this place up from corner to corner!
Aw yeah! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, bestie, how about we break for lunch? Let's
have a salmon party with the catch we hauled in
today!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yikes, my arms feel like they're gonna break from
this. ★ Maybe we should we go all in on arm
wrestling instead of racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My muscles are getting a workout just imagining
that.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, like an endurance challenge or something?
True, the temp dips real low out here in winter,
and it snows too.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... Bestie, this cold is no joke! Let's try to
count the vibes to pass time...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Uuugh, one vibe... Shiver... Two vibes... Shiver... Whoa, snow bunnies are partying it up in my head...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Th-this is rough for sure... But I can hold out, I
know it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This level of cold is nothing like the chilly weather
we get at Tracen Academy. This will build
perseverance in no time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Nature's weird when you think about it, though. I
used to think there was nothing out here when I
was a kid...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But I was way off. You can do anything you think
of out here!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Yeah, I'm the one who decides what I want to
do.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days pass...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn... Is it mornin' already?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Everything is just so fun. Fishing, foraging,
cooking, and making vids.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(I'm totally free! I can do whatever I wanna do! I
can live however I wanna live! But if that's the
case...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Then what is it I really want to do?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (I'll just close my eyes... and ask myself...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(What do I want to do? What is my heart saying?
Tell me what my true feelings are, and what I'm
screaming for at my very core.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(What are the feelings that are surging up in me?
If I were free to do whatever I wanted, what
would I be doing?)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: What's this?

text_block_list.name: Faint Voices
text_block_list.text: Wooooo...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: These voices...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whooooosh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: The wind. Just like the wind...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wake up in my tent. Wiping my eyes, I step
outside and see...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(The wind feels amazing! Fresh air in my lungs...
Warm sunshine on my skin...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(This is all I want. Just this. I don't need
opponents or a finish line. All I need is...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All I need is to run as fast as I want, as far as I
want! Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer races across an open field at
daybreak.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She looks so in her element, so alive... and
absolutely stunning.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Running is the answer. Running is what I love.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't have to do with how far or how fast I
can go, but when I let my mind go blank and just
run...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: My neck tenses and shivers go down my back!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't running for any particular reason just now.
The sight of the horizon opening up before me
made my heart and legs surge forward.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
That's why I know for sure that what I love to do...
is simply to run.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah! It is!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We share a smile. No further words are needed. It
seems that, at long last, Mejiro Palmer has
glimpsed her true feelings.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer? Do you see Mount Yotei right
behind us?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I turn around and look at the mountain standing
over Mejiro Palmer's hometown.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Way back when, I used to be kinda scared of it. It
felt like it was watching me and making sure I ran
properly.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It was like I had this huge pressure always looming
over me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She was scared of it as a child, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! Now?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I'm still scared by it!
choice_data_list: Your feelings about it haven't changed?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Nah, they have. It's not as scary as before. And
about time, too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Today, I finally showed it what my real running is like. It wasn't jaw-dropping or anything, but it was my running.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Today, I ran just 'cause I felt like it!
